title: Unit 5 – G12: Media Day (Linking Words – Mediensicherheit)
description: Bindewörter in Sätzen über Mediensicherheit und Cybermobbing: because, as soon as, so that, before, whenever, although

items.question: You need to be careful on social networks ___ people on them might be strangers.
You should block someone ___ they send you something that makes you feel bad.
Change your password ___ it's more difficult for people to get into your account.
___ you add somebody to your friends list, think about whether you really know them.
Some cyber bullies can be very cruel online ___ they are as bad as nasty people in real life.
___ somebody posts nasty things, they are bullying people.
___ you have anti-virus software, you should still be careful online.
Luke: Why be careful on social networks? → Answer uses:
Jay: When to block someone? → Answer uses:
Holly: Why change my password? → Answer uses:
Gwen: What to do before adding a friend? → Answer uses:
Olivia: Somebody posts nasty things – Bindewort:
Dave: Anti-virus programme, still be careful? → Answer uses:
Cybermobbing → Englisch
jemanden blocken → to ___ somebody
Passwort ändern → to ___ your password
jemanden zu seinen Freunden hinzufügen → to ___ somebody
gemeine Kommentare → ___ comments
vorsichtig sein → to be ___
Antivirenprogramm → Englisch
